description: Bridge Codex and other MCP clients with Anthropic Claude Code CLI for read-only second opinions
name: io.github.Lykhoyda/ask-claude

environmentVariables.description: Default Claude model alias or full model name (default: opus)
environmentVariables.name: ASK_CLAUDE_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Claude CLI fallback when the default is overloaded or unavailable (default: sonnet)
environmentVariables.name: ASK_CLAUDE_FALLBACK_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Timeout for Claude CLI execution in milliseconds (default: 600000 = 10 minutes)
environmentVariables.name: ASK_CLAUDE_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error (default: warn)
environmentVariables.name: GMCPT_LOG_LEVEL
